creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
FUJISHIMA Satsuki wrote:
> It seems you forgot to add some lines in your patch like this:
> 
> -MAINTAINER=	hym@cocoa.freemail.ne.jp
> +MAINTAINER=	clefevre@citeweb.net
> 
> OK? :-)

no, I didn't. but if `hym' don't have the time to maintain this port,
I have no objection except that I'm not GUI (read X11) aware and while
this port don't work on my machine, I'm not able to debug it but I don't
know if this problem is local to my machine or generic ?

Cyrille.
